description_long: This is a large, pole-mounted advertising board with a rectangular display surface supported by a robust cylindrical column. The front face features a printed advertisement with a blue background, business-related keywords, and an image of a person, suggesting a focus on marketing or corporate themes. The structure includes a metal platform with safety railings and an access ladder, allowing maintenance personnel to reach the display area. The frame and platform appear to be constructed from galvanized steel, providing durability and weather resistance. The back of the board is plain and metallic, with visible support beams and structural elements. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing visibility and accessibility for urban roadside or commercial environments.
description: A large, pole-mounted advertising board with a blue business-themed ad, metal platform, safety railings, and access ladder. The structure is robust and designed for high visibility and maintenance access.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain metallic back, support beams, and the cylindrical mounting pole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the board, the metal platform, safety railing, and the access ladder.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the blue business-themed advertisement, the full width of the platform, and the supporting pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the platform, railing, and the thickness of the board's frame.
attribute_frame_design: thick metallic frame with straight edges and structural support beams
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster with business-themed graphics and keywords
